The company is described as the modern data infrastructure layer for the AI era, providing a fully managed real-time data streaming platform that keeps production data continuously in sync with Snowflake.

items.headline: Introducing the Artie Terraform Provider
items.summary: Artie released an official Terraform provider in the Terraform registry, enabling customers to manage Artie deployments through infrastructure-as-code. The provider supports consistent deployment configurations, credential management, change review, and Git-backed audit trails.

items.headline: Astrato Lands $5M to Replace Outdated BI Tools with Next-Gen, AI-Native Cloud Analytics
items.summary: Astrato raised a $5 million seed round led by Big Pi Ventures to build a cloud-native BI platform that runs live queries directly on Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, and ClickHouse without moving data. The London-based company, founded by the team behind Vizlib, was showing 5x year-over-year revenue growth at the time of the raise.

items.headline: Snowflake Cortex is Now Live in Astrato
items.summary: Astrato launched native integration with Snowflake Cortex LLM, giving users access to models from Meta, Claude, DeepSeek, and Mistral directly within the platform with no data movement. The company holds Snowflake Technology Ready Validated status and differentiates through its semantic layer for context-aware, enterprise-grade text-to-SQL generation.

items.headline: Astrato and Propelling Tech Partner to Simplify and Scale Cloud Analytics
items.summary: Astrato formed a strategic alliance with Propelling Tech to deliver real-time, self-service analytics on live cloud data across healthcare, financial services, retail, and SaaS. The partnership is positioned as a natural upgrade path for Qlik and Vizlib users, given Astrato was built by the team behind Vizlib, the most widely adopted value-added solution for Qlik Sense.

items.headline: Snowflake Summit: The After Hours Edit — Atrium Hosts Networking Happy Hour at Summit 2026
items.summary: Atrium hosted an exclusive happy hour networking event on June 2, 2026 during Snowflake Summit 2026 at Next Chapter Cocktails & Tapas Lounge (142 Minna St, San Francisco). The event brought together data and AI professionals from 6–8 pm PT, with Retool as sponsor, reinforcing Atrium's active presence as a Snowflake consulting partner at the summit.

items.headline: Atrium Surpasses $1 Billion Customer ROI Goal, Driven by Industry-Leading AI-Assisted Delivery
items.summary: Atrium, the AI-native Salesforce and Snowflake consulting firm, announced it has surpassed $1 billion in documented customer impact tracked via its Customer Impact Dashboard. The milestone was driven by Andi, Atrium's autonomous AI consultant, which the company claims enables solution deployment up to 98% faster than traditional consulting methods.

items.headline: Atrium Named to Inc.'s 2026 Best Workplaces List for the Fifth Time
items.summary: Atrium was recognized on Inc. magazine's 2026 Best Workplaces list for the fifth consecutive time, selected from 507 honorees based on Quantum Workplace employee surveys covering management effectiveness, perks, professional development, and culture. CEO Chris Heineken cited the company's founding belief that great outcomes start with great people as central to the recognition.

items.headline: Snowflake Summit 2026 Sessions for Higher Education and Government
items.summary: Avaap, a Snowflake Premier Partner, promoted its curated sessions at Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1-4, Moscone Center) aimed at higher education and government organizations. Featured sessions included Ohio Department of Taxation's AI-powered call center transcript analytics using Snowflake Cortex, a Sigma AI workflow demonstration for unstructured data pipelines, and a session on data and AI governance innovations.

items.headline: Avaap Named Snowflake Premier Partner
items.summary: Avaap announced it achieved Snowflake Premier Partner status, recognizing its expertise in delivering scalable, secure, AI-ready data solutions for state and local government, higher education, and nonprofit sectors. The designation builds on Avaap's Workday Services Partner capabilities, enabling integrated Workday-Snowflake analytics and early access to Snowflake Cortex and Intelligence features.

items.headline: Unlocking Snowflake's Full Potential with Avaap
items.summary: Avaap published a detailed overview of its Snowflake practice, covering three core areas: building secure governed data foundations, integrating Workday operational data with Snowflake for enterprise analytics across finance and HR, and delivering practical AI solutions for public sector organizations. The post positions Avaap as a specialized partner for higher education, government, and nonprofit clients moving from data consolidation to AI-driven insights.

items.headline: Bigeye Announces AI Guardian to Give Enterprises Control Over Agent Data Access
items.summary: Bigeye launched AI Guardian, a runtime enforcement control plane that evaluates every AI agent request against organizational data policies, operating in monitoring, advising, or steering modes. The product is part of Bigeye's AI Trust Platform and was released in private preview for enterprise customers including USAA, Zoom, Hertz, Cisco, and Freedom Mortgage.

items.headline: Bigeye Introduces the First Platform for Governing AI Data Usage
items.summary: Bigeye announced the AI Trust Platform, described as the industry's first solution unifying data governance, observability, and enforcement to control how AI agents access and use enterprise data. The company also announced plans to host its inaugural AI Trust Summit in early 2026 for data and AI leaders.

items.headline: Bigeye Launches Bigeye Dependency Driven Monitoring to Ensure Reliable Analytics
items.summary: Bigeye launched Dependency Driven Monitoring, positioning itself as the first data observability platform to connect analytics dashboards to column-level data lineage across both modern and legacy data sources. The solution targets Fortune 500 enterprises with hybrid infrastructure and integrates with Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, and Redshift among 50+ connectors.

items.headline: bem raises seed round to end manual data integration
items.summary: Brilliant Enterprise Magic (bem) raised $3.7 million in seed funding led by Uncork Capital, with participation from Kevin Mahaffey, Roar Ventures, and Garry Tan. The company's AI platform converts unstructured data — invoices, emails, PDFs, spreadsheets — into structured, schema-valid JSON via a REST API, targeting supply chain, logistics, healthcare, insurance, and financial services sectors.

items.headline: Investing in bem: The Infrastructure Making AI Reliable
items.summary: BuenTrip Ventures announced an investment in bem.ai, citing the company's 99.999% precision claims for transforming unstructured data (PDFs, emails, audio, video) into structured, auditable formats as foundational AI infrastructure. The firm highlighted bem's focus on reliability for enterprise AI agent deployments — particularly in finance, logistics, and customer service — as a key differentiator. Co-founders Antonio Bustamante and Upal Saha are also named.

items.headline: Brilliant Enterprise Magic — welcome Bem!
items.summary: Uncork Capital Managing Partner Andy McLoughlin published a blog post welcoming Brilliant Enterprise Magic (bem) to their portfolio after leading the company's $3.7 million seed round. The post describes bem's mission to deliver 'structured data as-a-service' — eliminating manual data integration by transforming messy inputs into structured knowledge for engineering teams building in supply chain, logistics, healthcare, insurance, and financial services.

items.headline: Migrating from Python to Go: ingestr v1
items.summary: Bruin launched ingestr v1, a complete rewrite of its open-source data ingestion CLI from Python to Go. The rewrite delivers significantly faster performance through aggressive concurrency and Apache Arrow integration, addressing bottlenecks and distribution issues that arose after the original version reached 3.5k GitHub stars and adoption by hundreds of organizations.

items.headline: Meet Bruin's AI data analyst in Slack, Teams, and browser
items.summary: Bruin launched an AI-powered data analyst interface that lets teams ask natural language questions about company data directly within Slack, Microsoft Teams, and the browser. The product returns answers grounded in inspectable SQL queries, with enterprise security features including role-based access controls, SSO, and GDPR-aligned data residency.

items.headline: Introducing Bruin MCP: Your AI Agent's Data Toolkit
items.summary: Bruin launched Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, enabling AI agents in editors like Cursor and Claude Code to interact with data workflows through natural language. The free, open-source integration allows agents to ingest data from 60+ sources, run pipelines, and compare tables across environments conversationally.

items.headline: Velir x Brooklyn Data Named Sigma Premier Partner
items.summary: Brooklyn Data (operating as Velir x Brooklyn Data) was recognized as a Premier Partner in Sigma Computing's SI Partner Program, based on product expertise, certifications, growth, and specializations. The company brings over four years and 20+ Sigma engagements, including serving as a launch partner for Sigma AI Apps and creating three featured demo applications in Sigma's library.

items.headline: Brooklyn Data, a Velir Company, Reaches Elite Partner Status with Snowflake
items.summary: Brooklyn Data achieved Elite tier partnership status with Snowflake — the highest recognition level in Snowflake's partner ecosystem — following a six-year partnership history demonstrating strong execution across Financial Services, Healthcare, and Retail sectors. Snowflake's Director of Global Partner Development noted that Brooklyn Data's acquisition by Velir expanded capabilities by combining data expertise with digital and marketing competencies.

items.headline: Domo Partners with Brooklyn Data to Simplify the AI and Data Journey for Businesses
items.summary: Domo (NASDAQ: DOMO) announced a partnership with Brooklyn Data Co. to help joint customers streamline data management by combining Domo's platform with Snowflake's AI Data Cloud. The collaboration focuses on simplifying data integration and leveraging advanced analytics to enhance enterprise decision-making.

items.headline: Cloudera Adopts Apache Polaris to Advance Open, Governed Data Access for Enterprise AI Anywhere
items.summary: Announced at Snowflake Summit 2026, Cloudera adopted Apache Polaris as part of its open data lakehouse architecture powered by Apache Iceberg, contributing a new Apache Ranger authorizer plugin in Apache Polaris 1.5. The move improves interoperability and governed data access across hybrid and multicloud environments for enterprise AI, with Cloudera CPO Leo Brunnick noting that 79% of organizations struggle to access all their data across environments.

items.headline: Cloudera Achieves the AWS AI Competency
items.summary: Cloudera earned the AWS AI Competency designation, recognizing its technical proficiency in implementing generative and autonomous AI technologies for enterprises. The certification validates Cloudera's AI Anywhere strategy, enabling deployment on-premises or on AWS with Amazon Bedrock integration, maintaining governance and security for regulated industries.

items.headline: Cloudera Launches Workflow Data Fabric Zero Copy Connector for ServiceNow
items.summary: Cloudera announced a new Workflow Data Fabric Zero Copy Connector for ServiceNow at the Knowledge26 conference, enabling enterprises to query data in place without costly data movement pipelines. The integration supports compliance with regulations including the EU AI Act, DORA, and HIPAA while enabling production-scale agentic AI deployment.

items.headline: The Local's Guide to Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Coastal Cloud, a data/AI/cloud and Snowflake consulting firm, published a comprehensive attendee guide to Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1–4, Moscone Center, San Francisco). The guide covers event planning tips, Bay Area neighborhood recommendations, dining options near Moscone, local transportation, and safety information for visiting professionals.

items.headline: Coastal Joins Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) to Accelerate Salesforce-Led Transformation at Global Scale
items.summary: Coastal Cloud announced its acquisition by TCS, a global IT services firm operating across 46 countries, while retaining its brand and culture established since 2012. Coastal brought over 600 North American professionals with 3,091 certifications including 442 across Agentforce, AI, and Snowflake, serving approximately 1,700 customers.

items.headline: Contentsquare Completes Acquisition of Loris AI
items.summary: Contentsquare finalized its acquisition of Loris, a conversation intelligence platform that analyzes customer support interactions using AI to identify sentiment, intent, and quality signals. The deal combines digital experience analytics with conversation intelligence to give brands a unified view of the complete customer journey, from digital click to support conversation.

items.headline: New Shopify-Contentsquare Deal Targets Major Conversion Leaks
items.summary: Contentsquare announced a partnership with Shopify to integrate AI-driven behavioral analytics across the full e-commerce customer journey, extending from initial site entry through checkout completion across more than 175 countries. The integration requires no tagging or engineering setup and is available via a new Shopify Partner app.

items.headline: Contentsquare Strengthens Executive Leadership Team to Fuel Future Growth
items.summary: Contentsquare announced three senior executive appointments: Costa Harbilas as President of Go-to-Market, Patrice Attia as Chief Revenue Officer, and Rachel Obstler as Chief Product Officer. All three join the Executive Committee as the company accelerates growth of its digital experience analytics platform.

items.headline: Crunchbase Introduces Market Insights with 5,100+ Micro-Industry Segments and AI-Powered Competitor Intelligence
items.summary: Crunchbase launched Market Insights, introducing over 5,100 granular market segments organized by what companies actually build, an improved competitor intelligence model delivering 90% precision on each company's top three competitors, and a market momentum signal that classifies segments as emerging, growing, or declining.

items.headline: Crunchbase Uses AI to Predict Startup Success with 95% Accuracy
items.summary: Crunchbase announced a strategic pivot from historical data provider to an AI-driven predictive engine, claiming 95% accuracy in backtesting for predicting funding rounds, acquisitions, and growth trajectories using data from 80 million active users. CEO Jagg McConnell stated traditional data companies face a survival crisis within five years if they cannot offer predictive capabilities.

items.headline: Snowflake Runs Your Data: Dagster Runs Everything Else
items.summary: Dagster published a pre-Summit post explaining how it complements Snowflake's native capabilities — covering SQL-first orchestration, Dynamic Tables integration, and cost attribution via Dagster+ Insights. The post coincided with Dagster's presence at Snowflake Summit 2026 (booth 1222) in San Francisco.

items.headline: Introducing Compass: Data-driven decisions right in Slack
items.summary: Dagster Labs CEO Pete Hunt announced Compass, an AI data analyst that lets non-technical users ask natural-language questions about company data directly in Slack, without writing SQL. Compass incorporates institutional knowledge and supports conversational follow-up questions, positioning Dagster beyond pipeline orchestration into AI-powered analytics.

items.headline: Dagster+ Now Available in the EU
items.summary: Dagster Labs launched Dagster+ in European data centers (eu-north-1), initially with Hybrid deployments to meet EU data residency and compliance requirements; a December 2025 update expanded support to fully managed Serverless deployments. The launch addressed growing demand from European organizations needing the orchestration control plane within EU boundaries.

items.headline: Datacove Wins Business of the Year (Up to £1m Turnover) at 2025 Gatwick Diamond Business Awards
items.summary: Datacove was named Business of the Year (Up to £1m Turnover) at the 2025 Gatwick Diamond Business Awards. The award celebrates high-performing and innovative small businesses that do the right thing for their clients, people, and the Gatwick Diamond community.

items.headline: Datacove Organises EARL 2026 Data Intelligence Conference in Brighton
items.summary: Datacove is organising EARL 2026, a cross-sector International Data Intelligence conference scheduled for October 6-8, 2026 in Brighton, England. The event covers a broad range of languages and techniques including R, Python, SQL, Rust, and modern AI/ML tooling, with emphasis on real-world commercial impact.

items.headline: Translating the Untranslatable: Datafold Migration Agent Now Supports All Major ETL Tools
items.summary: Datafold expanded its AI-powered Migration Agent to support all major legacy ETL platforms including Informatica, Talend, IBM DataStage, SSIS, Matillion, and Alteryx, enabling automated code translation and refactoring to modern cloud-native targets like Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, and dbt. The agent guarantees data accuracy validation, reducing migration timelines from months or years to weeks.

items.headline: Datafold Introduces AI-Powered Code Review in CI: Automated PR Summaries, Root Cause Analysis, and Context-Aware Chat
items.summary: Datafold launched three AI-powered capabilities for CI pipelines in private beta: automated pull request summaries explaining what and why data changed, root cause analysis linking data changes to specific code lines, and a context-aware chat interface for querying PR changes using lineage data. The features are grounded in Datafold's core data validation technology.

items.headline: Data Migrations Reimagined: Introducing the AI-Powered Datafold Migration Agent
items.summary: Datafold announced its AI-powered Migration Agent, capable of translating SQL across any dialect and integrating with orchestration tools like Airflow, dbt, and GUI-based platforms. The agent combines AI code translation with cross-database data diffing and iterative validation, achieving 5-10x faster migrations and compressing timelines from months or years to weeks.

items.headline: SAP to Acquire Dremio to Unify SAP and Non-SAP Data for Agentic AI
items.summary: SAP announced plans to acquire Dremio, a data lakehouse platform, alongside AI startup Prior Labs, to strengthen its Business Data Cloud with federation capabilities across SAP and non-SAP data sources. The deal is expected to close in Q3 2026 pending regulatory approval.

items.headline: Dremio Cloud: An autonomous lakehouse powered by AI agents
items.summary: Dremio launched Dremio Cloud as an agentic lakehouse platform that autonomously learns, adapts, and optimizes performance to reduce manual data engineering tasks. The platform includes native Model Context Protocol support, an open catalog for governed data access, and an automatically generated semantic layer for AI agent accuracy.

items.headline: Dremio Named Data Breakthrough Awards' Data Analytics Solution of the Year
items.summary: Dremio won the 7th annual Data Breakthrough 'Data Analytics Solution of the Year' award, its third time earning the distinction (also winning in 2024 and 2020), recognizing its Agentic Lakehouse platform built on Apache Iceberg. The program received over 3,500 nominations, with Amazon cited as achieving 10x faster query performance and a 90% reduction in project completion times.

items.headline: Dun & Bradstreet and OpenAI Collaborate to Power Finance Workflows for Enterprises and Small Businesses
items.summary: Dun & Bradstreet integrated its D&B Commercial Graph into ChatGPT and Codex via Model Context Protocol servers, enabling financial professionals to access verified business identity, ownership, credit, and risk data directly within OpenAI platforms. Use cases include due diligence, credit origination, and financial reporting, with timelines potentially reduced from months to minutes.

items.headline: Dun & Bradstreet Brings Verified Business Data into Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Dun & Bradstreet launched a Graph Connector in Microsoft 365 Copilot, providing enterprises with no-cost access to a curated sample of verified business data on tens of thousands of global companies. The connector supports AI-powered workflows for sales, market research, and supplier discovery across Microsoft 365 apps.

items.headline: Dun & Bradstreet Partners With Anthropic to Automate Business Onboarding
items.summary: Dun & Bradstreet integrated its Commercial Graph database with Anthropic's Claude AI platform via a Model Context Protocol server to streamline know-your-customer and know-your-business workflows for regulated industries. The partnership enables financial institutions to accelerate corporate onboarding and compliance by automating verification, risk assessment, and audit-ready documentation.

items.headline: EPAM and Anthropic Team Up to Build the Future of Enterprise Transformation with Safe, Applied AI
items.summary: EPAM Systems announced a multi-year strategic partnership with Anthropic to deliver enterprise-grade AI solutions, combining EPAM's engineering expertise with Anthropic's Claude models, Claude Code, and Claude Agent SDK. The partnership includes a CEO-mandated initiative to certify over 10,000 Claude architects, with 1,300 already certified at announcement and 5,000 targeted by end of Q3 2026.

items.headline: EPAM and Cursor Announce Strategic Partnership to Build and Scale AI-Native Teams for Global Enterprises
items.summary: EPAM Systems and Cursor formed a strategic partnership combining Cursor's AI-native IDE with EPAM's engineering expertise and 50,000+ engineers to help global enterprises scale generative AI development beyond pilots. The collaboration focuses on deploying AI-native workflows across thousands of developers with measurable gains in productivity and software quality.

items.headline: Espresso AI Launches Agentic Lakehouse for Databricks
items.summary: Espresso AI unveiled a solution that transforms Databricks into an agentic lakehouse via three specialized agents — Autoscaling, Scheduling, and Query — designed to reduce Databricks infrastructure costs by roughly 50%. The company, founded by three ex-Googlers, completed a six-month beta with enterprises including Booz Allen Hamilton and Comcast before the launch.

items.headline: Espresso AI Raises $11M to Cut Cloud Costs with Generative AI
items.summary: Espresso AI emerged from stealth with over $11 million in seed and pre-seed funding — seed led by Daniel Gross and Nat Friedman, pre-seed led by Matt Turck at FirstMark — to build an AI-powered platform that automatically optimizes SQL queries and reduces cloud data warehouse costs by up to 80%. The company's initial product targets Snowflake workloads with setup taking under 10 minutes.

items.headline: Etleap Launches Iceberg Pipeline Platform to Simplify Enterprise Adoption of Apache Iceberg
items.summary: Etleap introduced a managed pipeline system that unifies ingestion, transformation, orchestration, and Apache Iceberg table operations into a single system running inside customers' Virtual Private Cloud environments. CEO Christian Romming stated the platform enables data teams to adopt Iceberg without building and operating a custom pipeline stack.

items.headline: Etleap unveils unified Iceberg data pipeline platform
items.summary: Etleap launched a unified pipeline platform for Apache Iceberg that consolidates ingestion, transformation, orchestration, and table management into one managed system operating within customers' VPCs. IDC analyst Marlanna Bozicevich noted that solutions like Etleap's that unify pipeline management and Iceberg operations can help teams meet performance and scalability demands while maintaining architectural openness.

items.headline: Etleap Introduces a New Managed Pipeline Layer Created for Apache Iceberg
items.summary: Etleap introduced its Iceberg pipeline platform described as the missing pipeline layer that Iceberg itself lacks, consolidating ingestion, transformation, orchestration, and table operations into a single managed system running within customers' VPCs. The platform supports downstream analytics, AI, and data sharing use cases and is currently in use by customers running Iceberg pipelines at scale.

items.headline: Snowflake Startup Spotlight: Euno
items.summary: Snowflake featured Euno CEO Sarah Levy in its Startup Spotlight series, highlighting how the company's metadata intelligence platform provides governance automation and automated context for AI agents — including those powering Snowflake Intelligence. Euno uses column-level lineage and certified dataset signals to give AI systems the context needed for reliable, explainable, enterprise-scale analytics.

items.headline: Euno is officially live on Cyera's integrations
items.summary: Euno announced its integration with Cyera, a Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) platform, propagating PII and PCI classifications from warehouse columns through to BI fields, reports, and dashboards. The partnership gives security teams visibility into who accesses sensitive data across the BI layer and enables automatic access revocation when policies are violated.

items.headline: This Omni x Euno integration is a big one
items.summary: Euno announced a major integration with Omni, the AI analytics platform, embedding Omni's built-in analytical logic into Euno's column-level lineage so AI agents can query enterprise data with governed semantics. CEO Sarah Levy said the integration helps organizations deploy enterprise AI workloads on a trusted foundation in weeks rather than months.

items.headline: FactSet Accelerates Innovation in Banking with Launch of a New AI-Native Solution in Partnership with Finster AI
items.summary: FactSet launched FactSet AI for Banking, an agentic AI-powered workflow automation platform for investment banking teams, built in partnership with Finster AI (in which FactSet also made a strategic investment). The solution automates pitch materials, research memos, and buyer/seller analysis with full traceability, integrating with FactSet Workstation and Microsoft Office; currently in alpha with broader rollout planned through 2026.

items.headline: FactSet Integrates Advanced AI Financial Crime Risk Management Tools into Workstation for Corporate Banks
items.summary: FactSet launched integrated AI-driven KYC, AML, and sanctions-screening capabilities within FactSet Workstation, built in partnership with ComplyAdvantage. The solution automates up to 80% of compliance review steps, cuts onboarding times by up to 50%, and decreases compliance alert errors by up to 70% for mid-market and regional corporate banks.

items.headline: FactSet Meets Demand for AI-Ready Data, First to Announce MCP Sans Intermediary
items.summary: FactSet launched what it described as the industry's first production-grade Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, giving AI systems direct real-time access to nine curated financial datasets including Fundamentals, Consensus Estimates, Ownership, and Global M&A Intelligence. The server emerged from a beta used by 45 firms and over 800 institutional users, and is aimed at enterprise AI teams building agentic financial workflows.

items.headline: Foundational Launches Foundational IQ, Bringing Deterministic Code Analysis to Agent Deployment for Enterprise Data and AI Governance
items.summary: Foundational launched Foundational IQ, a conversational and agentic governance interface that analyzes code across SQL, Python, Java, Scala, COBOL, and other languages to map data flows from source to consumption. The product automates compliance tasks such as PII classification and lineage audits, operating within enterprise LLM environments including Snowflake, Databricks, and AWS without moving data outside customer infrastructure.

items.headline: Foundational Now Available on Snowflake Marketplace
items.summary: Foundational (Foundational Data, Inc.) listed its data and AI governance platform on the Snowflake Marketplace, giving Snowflake customers streamlined procurement of cross-platform lineage and governance capabilities. The listing provides coverage for SQL and non-SQL frameworks including Spark, Kafka, and Flink, and integrates with Snowflake Cortex Code for AI workloads.

items.headline: Foundational Secures $8M to Bring AI Agents into Data Engineering
items.summary: Foundational announced general availability and an $8M seed round led by Viola Ventures and Gradient Ventures. The platform integrates with git to analyze pull requests in SQL, Python, and Scala, helping data teams at companies like Lemonade, Ramp, and Lightricks identify and prevent data issues before code is deployed.

items.headline: Genesis Computing at Snowflake Summit 2026: Meet the Team
items.summary: Genesis Computing is participating at Snowflake Summit 2026, inviting attendees to book time with their team to discuss data, AI, infrastructure, and product strategy. The company offers pre-trained AI agents designed to accelerate enterprise data engineering on Snowflake, Databricks, AWS, and Azure.

items.headline: Genesis Computing Recognised in Gartner's "Data Engineering 2.0" Research
items.summary: Genesis Computing was recognized in Gartner's "Data Engineering 2.0" report as the only agentic platform purpose-built to automate enterprise data engineering. The company's Context Graph technology provides agents with contextual awareness of enterprise systems, and the platform claims to reduce data migrations and onboarding from months to days.

items.headline: Snowflake invests in Genesis Computing, bringing chatbot assistants to the AI Data Cloud
items.summary: Snowflake Ventures invested in Genesis Computing, whose platform is natively built on Snowflake and allows users to create autonomous data agents called "Genbots" that automate data-centric tasks for business analysts, data engineers, and data ops teams. Genesis was founded by former Snowflake executives Matt Glickman and Justin Langseth, and its applications are available through the Snowflake Marketplace.

items.headline: Genpact and Google Cloud Expand Alliance to Bring Agentic Solutions to the Office of the CFO
items.summary: Genpact and Google Cloud announced an expanded alliance to develop and scale agentic AI-led solutions for enterprise finance operations, with the first product — Genpact Finance One: Revenue Lens Agents — now available on Google Cloud's Agent Marketplace. The collaboration targets Fortune 500 companies seeking to modernize CFO functions including revenue forecasting, accounts payable, and financial planning.

items.headline: Genpact Acquires XponentL Data to Accelerate AI-Led Innovation
items.summary: Genpact (NYSE: G) acquired XponentL Data, a data products and AI solutions provider headquartered in Pennsylvania, to bolster its AI Gigafactory and Service-as-Agentic-Solutions offerings. XponentL brings domain expertise in Life Sciences and Healthcare, plus partnerships with Databricks, AWS, and Microsoft; all employees joined Genpact and Tom Johnstone continues to lead the unit.

items.headline: Genpact Named a Leader in ISG Provider Lens 2026 ServiceNow Ecosystem Partners
items.summary: Information Services Group named Genpact a Leader in two quadrants of the ISG Provider Lens 2026 ServiceNow Ecosystem Partners report — ServiceNow Consulting and Implementation Services, and Innovation on ServiceNow — citing its blend of agentic AI, process intelligence, and governed human-in-the-loop delivery. The recognition highlights Genpact's ability to scale AI from pilots to production within ServiceNow-enabled workflows across IT, finance, and supply chain.

items.headline: Greybeam Launches Cost Observability Tool on Snowflake Marketplace
items.summary: Greybeam announced at Snowflake Summit 2026 the launch of its Cost Observability Tool as a free Snowflake Native App, enabling data teams to monitor, analyze, and break down their Snowflake compute costs at the warehouse and query level. The tool helps organizations identify cost optimization opportunities directly within their Snowflake environment without requiring data movement.

items.headline: GrowthLoop Compound Marketing Engine Now Powered by Snowflake Cortex AI
items.summary: GrowthLoop announced at Snowflake Summit 2025 a deeper integration enabling its Compound Marketing Engine to leverage Snowflake Cortex AI, allowing marketing teams to activate AI Growth Agents — generating audiences, suggesting journeys, and orchestrating omnichannel campaigns — without moving data outside the Snowflake platform.

items.headline: TJC Deepens Financial Partnership with GrowthLoop as Enterprises Modernize Marketing with Agentic AI and Composable Data Infrastructure
items.summary: Private equity firm TJC made a follow-on investment in GrowthLoop, deepening its commitment since an initial 2022 stake; capital will support product development and go-to-market expansion in retail and media, as well as deeper integrations with cloud partners including Snowflake and Google Cloud. Enterprise clients on the platform include Costco, Ford, Google, Albertsons, Fanatics, and Allegro.

items.headline: River Pines Capital Announces Strategic Equity Investment in GrowthLoop
items.summary: River Pines Capital made a strategic equity investment in GrowthLoop to support the company's expansion and innovation. GrowthLoop's Compound Marketing Engine sits atop enterprise data warehouses to activate first-party data across omnichannel campaigns, including a tailored version for Commerce Media Networks. GrowthLoop was also recognized as 'One to Watch' in Snowflake's 2026 Modern Marketing Data Stack Report.

items.headline: Insightsoftware launches AI analytics platform Simba Intelligence
items.summary: insightsoftware made its Simba Intelligence AI analytics platform generally available, offering cloud, on-premises, or hybrid deployment. The platform uses a zero-data-movement architecture and produces deterministic (not generative) outputs with full audit trails, designed to deliver trustworthy enterprise AI for finance teams.

items.headline: Insightsoftware unifies semantic layer, governance to aid AI
items.summary: insightsoftware launched Simba Intelligence, a feature set pairing a semantic layer with automated governance and security policies to help enterprises build AI applications on trustworthy, business-contextual data. The announcement targets the common enterprise AI failure mode where models hallucinate against poorly organized data.

items.headline: insightsoftware Acquires JustPerform to Deliver Unified, No-Code, Cloud-Native Enterprise Performance Management
items.summary: insightsoftware acquired JustPerform, a cloud-native EPM platform for planning, consolidation, and financial reporting, marking the company's 29th acquisition. The deal adds AI-driven predictive analytics and automated insights to insightsoftware's CFO-office portfolio.

items.headline: Integrated Quantum Technologies Launches VEIL on Snowflake AI Data Cloud
items.summary: Integrated Cyber Solutions Inc. (dba Integrated Quantum Technologies) unveiled VEIL, a privacy-preserving data security solution, at Snowflake Summit 26. VEIL removes personally identifiable information from datasets before they enter machine learning pipelines, and is now accessible through the Snowflake AI Data Cloud.

items.headline: The Company Trying to Make Your AI Data Worthless to Hackers
items.summary: A sponsored profile of Integrated Quantum Technologies and its VEIL product, which uses a security-by-subtraction approach to strip PII from AI training data before models see it. The piece contextualizes two threat vectors: AI-automated cyberattacks and the harvest-now, decrypt-later post-quantum decryption risk. Note: publisher discloses share ownership and compensation for coverage.

items.headline: Integrated Quantum Technologies Announces Refiling of MD&A
items.summary: Integrated Cyber Solutions Inc. resubmitted its management's discussion and analysis for fiscal year 2025 following a continuous disclosure review by the BC Securities Commission. The revised MD&A adds clarifying disclosure on the company's validation and testing activities for its AIQu and VEIL products and related expenditures.

items.headline: Keebo Appoints Eric Shoemaker as Chief Executive Officer
items.summary: Keebo, Inc. named Eric Shoemaker as its new CEO; Shoemaker previously served as Chief Revenue Officer at Device42 before its $230M acquisition by Freshworks. Co-founder Barzan Mozafari transitioned to board duties, while Shoemaker leads go-to-market expansion and enterprise adoption of Keebo's autonomous Snowflake and Databricks optimization platform.

items.headline: Keebo Launches Workload Intelligence – Public Edition on Snowflake Marketplace
items.summary: Keebo announced the Workload Intelligence Public Edition, a Snowflake Native App that autonomously adjusts warehouse settings and routes queries to reduce over-provisioning and cut costs. The launch was timed to Snowflake Summit 2025 and includes a customer case study from Costco Travel citing a 50% cost reduction.

items.headline: Kloudgen Advances Enterprise AI with Semantiqa: Automated Semantic and Agent Layers Now on Snowflake Marketplace
items.summary: Kloudgen announced the expanded availability of Semantiqa on Snowflake Marketplace at Snowflake Summit 26, positioning the tool as a way to automate semantic layer creation and activate enterprise data for AI within a single day. CEO Yash Gupta stated the solution drastically reduces the time from raw data to actionable, interactive discovery by operating natively within Snowflake customer accounts.

items.headline: KPMG Returns as Sponsor of Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: KPMG is a returning sponsor at Snowflake Summit 2026, held June 1–4 at the Moscone Center in San Francisco. The firm highlights how it guides clients through data-driven, cloud-based business transformations using the Snowflake platform to deliver speed, scale, and lower costs.

items.headline: KPMG and Anthropic Sign Global Alliance and Launch Digital Gateway Powered by Claude
items.summary: KPMG and Anthropic announced a global alliance embedding Claude AI into KPMG's Digital Gateway platform, accessible to all 276,000 KPMG employees worldwide. The partnership includes KPMG becoming a preferred consultant for deploying Anthropic capabilities to private equity clients and launching KPMG Blaze for IT modernization.

items.headline: KPMG Named 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Global Industry Solutions: Breakthrough
items.summary: KPMG received the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year award for deploying Gemini Enterprise at enterprise scale, with over 90% of KPMG US professionals actively using the platform within two weeks of launch. The firm has built over 150 AI agents for clients globally and established Google Cloud Experience Centers across multiple countries.

items.headline: ABB Robotics Invests in LandingAI to Accelerate Vision AI
items.summary: ABB Robotics made a strategic investment in LandingAI through its venture arm to integrate LandingAI's visual AI software into ABB's robotics platform, with the goal of reducing robot vision AI training and deployment time by up to 80%. The partnership targets applications in item-picking, sorting, depalletizing, and quality inspection across logistics, healthcare, and food and beverage sectors.

items.headline: LandingAI Expands Agentic Document Intelligence with A Document Pre-trained Transformer
items.summary: LandingAI launched DPT-2, an upgraded Document Pre-trained Transformer model powering its Agentic Document Extraction (ADE) platform, adding capabilities such as complex table parsing without gridlines, figure and logo identification, and recognition of signatures, checkboxes, and barcodes. The company also launched a Builder Program giving developers priority support, early feature access, and higher rate limits for building document-processing applications.

items.headline: LandingAI Launches Agentic Document Extraction for Unlocking Insights from Complex Documents
items.summary: LandingAI announced major upgrades to its Agentic Document Extraction (ADE) platform, achieving a 17x speed improvement (from 135 seconds to 8 seconds median processing time) and enabling hundreds to thousands of pages per minute. Healthcare platform Eolas Medical deployed ADE to process over 100,000 clinical PDFs supporting 1.2 million monthly queries from medical professionals.

items.headline: LlamaIndex Secures $19 Million Series A to Power Enterprise-Grade Knowledge Agents
items.summary: LlamaIndex raised a $19 million Series A led by Norwest Venture Partners with participation from Greylock, bringing total funding to $27.5 million. The round coincided with the general availability launch of LlamaCloud, a commercial knowledge management platform for building production-grade AI agents over unstructured data, with customers including Rakuten, Carlyle, and Salesforce.

items.headline: LlamaIndex Releases LiteParse: A CLI and TypeScript-Native Library for Spatial PDF Parsing in AI Agent Workflows
items.summary: LlamaIndex open-sourced LiteParse, a TypeScript-native document parser built on PDF.js and Tesseract.js that runs entirely locally with zero cloud dependencies. It uses spatial text parsing to preserve document layout for AI agent workflows, positioning itself as a privacy-focused local alternative to LlamaIndex's managed LlamaParse service.

items.headline: Introducing ParseBench: The First Document Parsing Benchmark for AI Agents
items.summary: LlamaIndex launched ParseBench, an open evaluation framework of approximately 2,000 human-verified enterprise document pages with over 167,000 test rules across five capability dimensions including tables, charts, and visual grounding. LlamaIndex's own LlamaParse Agentic scored highest among 14 evaluated methods at 84.9% overall accuracy.

items.headline: LTM at Snowflake Summit 2026 — Booth 1102, San Francisco
items.summary: LTIMindtree exhibited at Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1–4, San Francisco) at Booth 1102, showcasing AI-ready Snowflake ecosystem solutions under the theme 'Outcreate with Intelligence at Scale.' Two speaker sessions covered AI strategy and AI engineering with Snowflake Cortex, featuring LTM leaders including the Head of their Snowflake Practice.

items.headline: LTM Makes Offer to Acquire Randstad's Technology and Consulting Services Business for ~€469M
items.summary: LTIMindtree announced a USD 500M+ offer to acquire Randstad's Technology and Consulting Services operations in France, Germany, Belgium, Luxembourg, and Australia, targeting aerospace, automotive, utilities, and BFSI sectors. CEO Venu Lambu described the deal as aligned with the company's five-year strategy to build a more resilient, diversified portfolio, with a five-year IT services partnership also included.

items.headline: LTM Launches BlueVerse M.A.X AI Marketing Assistant on Salesforce Agentforce
items.summary: LTIMindtree launched BlueVerse M.A.X, an AI Marketing Assist solution built on Salesforce's Agentforce platform that combines autonomous AI agents with human oversight for enterprise campaign creation, personalization, and optimization. The product extends LTM's BlueVerse agentic AI ecosystem into the marketing operations domain for global enterprises.

items.headline: Mastech Digital Strengthens Strategic Partnership with Informatica to Accelerate AI-Led IT Transformation Solutions
items.summary: Mastech Digital (NYSE: MHH) expanded its strategic alliance with Informatica to co-develop AI-powered data management solutions targeting healthcare, BFSI, and manufacturing sectors within a $50 billion addressable market. The partnership includes a co-branded AI and Data Outcomes Lab and 30-day proof-of-concept delivery blueprints.

items.headline: Mastech Digital Reports First Quarter 2026 Results, Highlights Bookings Growth and EDGE Initiative Progress
items.summary: Mastech Digital reported Q1 2026 revenues of $41.1 million with new bookings doubling year-over-year to $7.0 million TCV, as the company restructured into two segments — Talent and Data & AI — to reflect its AI-first strategy. CEO Nirav Patel noted the EDGE cost-transformation initiative is executing ahead of expectations, with $54.9 million in liquidity and no bank debt.

items.headline: Maxa at Snowflake Summit June 1–4, 2026
items.summary: Maxa confirmed its presence at Snowflake Summit 2026 in San Francisco, showcasing deterministic dbt pipelines, ERP/finance/ops data harmonization, and AI readiness at Booth 2711. The company invited attendees to book limited demo slots during the June 1–4 event.

items.headline: Introducing Maxa Autopilot: The Agentic Way to Build and Maintain Data Pipelines
items.summary: Maxa launched Autopilot, an agentic platform that converts business context, requirements, and source system data into production-ready dbt pipelines. The platform extracts requirements from workshop materials, harmonizes source data, and validates outputs against real business metrics, producing standard dbt code deployable on Snowflake, Databricks, or Microsoft Fabric with no proprietary runtime lock-in.

items.headline: Maxa Closes Series A Funding as Part of US$21 Million Round, Wins North America Data Drivers Award
items.summary: Maxa closed an oversubscribed US$21 million Series A round led by FRAMEWORK, with BDC Capital as co-lead and new investors including Snowflake Ventures, Amiral Ventures, and NAventures (National Bank of Canada). Simultaneously, Maxa won the 2024 North America Data Drivers Award for most innovative data-driven application on Snowflake.

items.headline: Siemens powers the next phase of industrial AI with Intelligence Center X
items.summary: Siemens unveiled Intelligence Center X at its Realize Live conference, an industrial AI orchestration platform that combines the Mendix low-code platform with Siemens' Graph Studio and AI Studio software. The platform integrates with Snowflake Semantic Views and Cortex AI as part of its ecosystem partner network.

items.headline: Vivix Vidros Planos achieves 4x faster quality resolution by scaling agentic AI with Mendix and Snowflake
items.summary: Mendix announced that Brazilian glass manufacturer Vivix Vidros Planos deployed over 30 Mendix applications integrated with Snowflake Cortex AI, reducing customer quality complaint resolution from 10 days to 2.5 days via a 'Virtual Engineer' AI agent. The case study was published at Snowflake Summit 2026.

items.headline: Mendix Continues Collaboration with Snowflake to Drive Superior Customer Value and Transform Development in the Automotive Industry
items.summary: Mendix became a Snowflake Data Cloud Product partner in Snowflake's Automotive Solutions launch, combining low-code application development with Snowflake's Cortex AI to help automotive enterprises accelerate digital transformation. Customer examples include deployments at Siemens Energy spanning 100+ applications and 200+ deployments.

items.headline: Metric Insights Listed as Attendee at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Metric Insights' official events page confirms the company is attending Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1-4, Moscone Center, San Francisco), along with other major 2026 data conferences including the Databricks Data + AI Summit (June 15-18, San Francisco).

items.headline: Metric Insights Releases Version 7.1.0 with Concierge AI Assistant and Analytics Marketplace
items.summary: Version 7.1.0, released April 24, 2025, introduces a fully integrated Concierge AI Assistant with intention-aware search, a new Analytics Marketplace for cross-catalog discovery across Atlan, Alation, Collibra, and Purview, and an App Builder (Alpha) for creating custom BI portal applications.

items.headline: Why Enterprises Stumble on AI for BI
items.summary: Metric Insights founder and CEO Marius Moscovici outlines four obstacles enterprises face when deploying AI for BI: technology selection paralysis, inadequate business context in AI tools, the prototype-to-production gap, and an expectations mismatch between users and passive chatbot interfaces.

items.headline: Neo4j Acquires GraphAware to Launch Intelligence Analysis Alternative to Palantir Gotham
items.summary: Neo4j announced an agreement to acquire GraphAware, an intelligence analysis software company serving government agencies, to create an open-standards alternative to Palantir Gotham. The combined platform (GraphAware Hume) will serve existing clients including the U.S. Department of Defense, Western Australia Police Force, and European Commission, with the deal advancing Neo4j's $100M AI investment roadmap.

items.headline: Neo4j Invests $100 Million in GenAI and Launches Key Agentic AI Innovations
items.summary: Neo4j announced a $100 million investment to accelerate its role as the default knowledge layer for agentic AI systems, along with the launch of Neo4j Aura Agent (a no/low-code platform for deploying AI agents) and an open-source Model Context Protocol Server for graph-based retrieval. The company also launched a startup program targeting over 1,000 AI-native companies within 12 months.

items.headline: Integrating Snowflake and Neo4j: Practical Graph Analytics for Your Data
items.summary: Snowflake published a developer guide detailing how Neo4j Graph Analytics for Snowflake enables users to run 65+ graph algorithms directly on Snowflake data without ETL, using standard SQL. The guide covers algorithms including PageRank, Betweenness Centrality, FastRP embeddings, and Louvain community detection for use cases like manufacturing workflow analysis.

items.headline: NiCE World 2026: Where Agentic AI Meets Enterprise Scale
items.summary: NICE announced its flagship user conference NiCE World 2026, scheduled June 8-10 at Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin in Orlando, FL, bringing together CX and technology leaders including customers from Citi, Hyatt, Aetna, and Geico, plus partners including Accenture, AWS, and Deloitte. The event will showcase advances to the CXone platform and NICE's agentic AI portfolio, with 150+ sessions and an AI Agent Factory where attendees can build and certify a functional AI agent.

items.headline: NiCE to Acquire Cognigy - Advancing the Leading CX AI Platform to Accelerate AI-First Customer Experience
items.summary: NICE announced the acquisition of Cognigy, a global leader in conversational and agentic AI, for approximately $955 million in cash, expected to close in Q4 2025. The deal integrates Cognigy's AI capabilities with the CXone platform to combine human-assisted engagement, autonomous self-service, and agentic orchestration on a single data foundation; Cognigy counts Mercedes-Benz, Nestle, and Lufthansa Group among its customers.

items.headline: NiCE Launches Agentic AI Innovation that Turns Enterprise Interaction Data into Ready-to-Deploy AI Agents
items.summary: Unveiled at Enterprise Connect 2026, NICE launched an agentic AI capability that analyzes enterprise interaction data across voice, chat, and digital channels to automatically identify automation opportunities and deploy production-ready AI agents under governance guardrails, reducing deployment timelines from months to hours within the CXone platform.

items.headline: Omni Raises Series C at $1.5B Valuation, Building the AI Analytics Platform for the Enterprise
items.summary: Omni raised $120 million in Series C funding led by ICONIQ at a $1.51 billion valuation, more than doubling its previous $650 million valuation. The round came after the company achieved nearly 4x year-over-year ARR growth and first-time monthly profitability, with the platform enabling governed semantic-layer analytics across dashboards, spreadsheets, and AI queries.

items.headline: Omni Skills for Cortex Code: A Full Data Stack Workflow in One CLI
items.summary: Omni released nine open-source Agent Skills for Snowflake's Cortex Code CLI, enabling complete analytics workflows from data generation through modeling to dashboard creation in a single terminal session. The announcement includes a reverse-sync capability translating Omni Topics into Snowflake Semantic Views, and Omni will have a booth (#2204) at Snowflake Summit 2026.

items.headline: Omni Acquires Explo to Expand into Embedded Analytics
items.summary: Omni Analytics acquired Explo, an embedded analytics platform that helps product teams deliver analytics to end users, extending Omni's reach into customer-facing analytics use cases. The Explo product will continue operating as-is during a 12-month transition period as its customer base migrates to the Omni platform.

items.headline: Openlayer Raises $14.5 Million Series A to Help Enterprises Scale AI with Confidence
items.summary: Openlayer closed a $14.5 million Series A round led by Race Capital, with participation from NXTP, KPN Ventures, Mindset, Y Combinator, Quiet Capital, and Telefonica. The company reported nearly 5x growth in 2024 and will use the funding to expand its unified AI evaluation and governance platform for enterprise customers.

items.headline: Openlayer Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for AI Evaluation and Observability Platforms
items.summary: Openlayer was named a Representative Vendor in the Gartner 2026 Market Guide for AI Evaluation and Observability Platforms, which examines tools helping organizations evaluate and monitor AI systems in development and production. CEO Gabriel Bayomi said the recognition validates the company's approach to providing a comprehensive control plane for the AI lifecycle.

items.headline: Openlayer Partners with Telefónica Tech to Deliver AI Governance and Observability Across Europe and Latin America
items.summary: Openlayer announced a commercial partnership with Telefónica Tech, the digital unit of Telefónica Group, to integrate Openlayer's AI governance platform into Telefónica Tech's enterprise services across Europe and Latin America. The solution covers pre-deployment testing for hallucinations and bias, production monitoring, and compliance mapping aligned with the EU AI Act and ISO 42001.

items.headline: Introducing DinoAI v3.0: The First End-to-End Data Engineering Agent
items.summary: Paradime launched DinoAI v3.0 as a fully autonomous background data engineering agent that can be invoked from Slack and other platforms to compress tasks traditionally taking 10-20 days into minutes. The release marks a shift from a copilot model to a true agentic operating system for data engineering, achieving a ~94% acceptance rate on data tasks.

items.headline: Paradime MCP Server: DinoAI Context Graph, Anywhere You Work
items.summary: Paradime announced the general availability of its MCP Server, providing a single authenticated endpoint that brings DinoAI's full context graph to any MCP-compatible client with 17 integrated tools covering code, warehouse, catalog, and orchestration. The server replaces multiple single-purpose MCP connectors while maintaining Paradime's existing access controls and governance.

items.headline: Introducing DinoAI Programmable Agents: Data Engineering Agents as Code
items.summary: Paradime launched DinoAI Programmable Agents, enabling teams to define AI agents as YAML in their repository and trigger them from CI/CD pipelines, DAGs, or any external system via GraphQL API or Python SDK. The launch extends DinoAI's agentic capabilities beyond interactive Slack use to fully automated, code-invoked data engineering workflows with multi-agent orchestration support.

items.headline: Announcing Polytomic Connect: An API for Two-Way ETL and Data Syncs
items.summary: Polytomic launched its second product, Connect, an embeddable API enabling developers to add two-way data syncing capabilities to their own products. The platform handles authentication, type conversions, rate limits, and scaling, supporting data warehouses, databases with CDC streaming, cloud apps, spreadsheets, and APIs, with native client libraries and real-time event streaming.

items.headline: Using PredictLeads + Polytomic to Power GTM Execution in HubSpot and Salesforce
items.summary: PredictLeads announced an integration with Polytomic enabling GTM teams to ingest hiring and business signal datasets and push enriched company profiles directly into HubSpot and Salesforce without engineering involvement. The partnership allows filtering by department, location, and job title to automate workflows like lead scoring, shortening the time from signal to action.

items.headline: Polytomic Release 2025.05.28: New Connectors and Sync Improvements
items.summary: Polytomic shipped new support for syncing HeyReach data and campaign/lead lists, email address identity mapping for Harmonic list syncs, and email address syncing from Affinity for Person fields. The release also fixed long-running Snowflake sync failures, Force Reconnect authentication issues, and Google Sheets record count discrepancies.

items.headline: Precog Secures Investment from Venture Guides to Accelerate Growth and Market Expansion
items.summary: Precog closed an investment round led by Boston-based Venture Guides, with Ben Holzman joining the Board of Directors. The round followed a banner year in which Precog added support for more than 1,500 SaaS ETL integrations and grew its enterprise customer base.

items.headline: Introducing Precog Automated Semantic Modeling: The Missing Link in Operational AI
items.summary: Precog launched Automated Semantic Modeling, a capability that combines AI-driven data ingestion with auto-generated semantic models to bridge the 'Context Gap' preventing enterprises from getting business value from AI. The system lets users state a business goal in plain language and automatically produces normalized data plus semantic models linking dimensions and metrics to that objective.

items.headline: Promethium at Snowflake Summit 2025 — Booth 1305 & Self-Service Data Session
items.summary: Promethium sponsored Snowflake Summit 2025 (June 2-5, San Francisco) at booth 1305, presenting a session titled 'Delivering Self-Service Data for AI Scale on Snowflake' on June 2 at 4 pm at Basecamp North Theater 2. The company showcased how its agentic data fabric platform enables self-service data access and AI-driven insights across Snowflake environments.

items.headline: Promethium Introduces First Agentic Platform Purpose-Built to Deliver Self-Service Data at AI Scale
items.summary: Promethium announced an updated Instant Data Fabric platform and Mantra, a new Data Answer Agent (in private preview) that lets data teams query distributed enterprise data using natural language to receive instant, trusted insights without ETL pipelines. The company was also recognized as a Gartner Cool Vendor in Data Management for GenAI disruption of traditional technologies.

items.headline: Promethium and NTT DATA Win Data & Analytics Partnership of the Year at Corinium Awards Gala
items.summary: Promethium and NTT DATA received the Data & Analytics Partnership of the Year award at the Corinium Data & Analytics Awards Gala held October 16, 2024 in Boston. The partnership centers on Promethium's Instant Data Fabric, enabling organizations to access and analyze enterprise data without duplication and deliver insights 100x faster than traditional methods.

items.headline: Prophecy at Snowflake Summit 2026 — Booth #1006, Moscone Center
items.summary: Prophecy exhibited at Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1-4, Moscone Center, San Francisco) at Booth #1006, showcasing its AI-driven visual data workflows for Snowflake. The company's platform enables governed, scalable data preparation using AI agents on Snowflake's cloud data platform.

items.headline: Prophecy Launches v4: AI Agents for Visual Data Prep & Analysis
items.summary: Prophecy announced v4, featuring AI agents that allow business users to create visual data workflows executing natively on Databricks, Snowflake, and BigQuery. The platform generates production-grade, inspection-ready code stored in Git, with CEO Raj Bains noting the same AI power now available to code-free business data users.

items.headline: Prophecy Takes in $47M Led by Smith Point Capital
items.summary: Prophecy raised a $47M Series B extension led by Smith Point Capital, with HSBC joining as a new investor alongside existing backers including Insight Partners, JPMorgan Chase, and SignalFire. The funding came on the back of 3.5x revenue growth in FY2024 with 160% net revenue retention, as Fortune 500 clients modernized legacy data pipelines using Prophecy's AI-powered visual designer.

items.headline: Qlik Helps Build Trusted Enterprise Context into Snowflake and Cortex Workflows
items.summary: At Snowflake Summit 26, Qlik announced expanded capabilities enabling Snowflake customers to integrate real-time enterprise data from SAP, mainframes, and SaaS systems into Snowflake, and introduced a Snowflake Native App for its Model Context Protocol Server so Cortex Agents can access Qlik-governed data and analytics assets directly from Snowflake workflows.

items.headline: Qlik and ServiceNow Partner to Bridge Enterprise Data and AI Workflows
items.summary: Qlik and ServiceNow announced a strategic partnership at Qlik Connect 2026 to embed trusted enterprise data and AI-driven insights into operational workflows, connecting the ServiceNow Workflow Data Fabric with external ERP, CRM, and supply chain systems. New Qlik metadata collectors enhance the ServiceNow Data Catalog for improved data discovery and governance.

items.headline: Qlik Acquires Upsolver to Deliver Low-Latency Ingestion and Optimization for Apache Iceberg
items.summary: Qlik acquired Upsolver, a specialist in real-time data streaming and Apache Iceberg optimization, to strengthen its end-to-end data integration platform for open lakehouses. Upsolver's Adaptive Iceberg Optimizer can reduce storage costs and improve query performance by up to 5x, with integrations spanning Snowflake, Databricks, and Athena.

items.headline: Qualytics Launches Data Control Layer to Govern Context for AI Systems
items.summary: Qualytics launched a Data Control Layer introducing a validate-at-use model that evaluates data quality at the moment AI systems reason and act, rather than only in downstream pipelines. The platform runs over 20,000 rules in production on average, with 95% inferred by AI, and integrates with external copilots via Model Context Protocol.

items.headline: Qualytics Announces Technology Partnership With Databricks to Deliver Proactive Data Quality for AI and Analytics
items.summary: Qualytics announced a native integration with the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform, enabling automated rule creation (95% auto-generated), adaptive anomaly detection, and row-level data quality management without requiring data to leave the Databricks environment. The integration supports Delta Lake, Lakeflow Jobs, Databricks SQL, and Unity Catalog.

items.headline: Qualytics Raises $10M Series A led by BMW i Ventures to Meet Surging Demand for Augmented Data Quality
items.summary: Qualytics raised a $10M Series A led by BMW i Ventures, with participation from Conductive Ventures and The Hill Fund by Firebrand Ventures, citing 5x revenue growth over the prior year. The funding is earmarked to scale product, engineering, and customer success teams to meet growing enterprise demand for AI-augmented data quality.

items.headline: Quest Software Extends Data and AI Leadership with Quest Data Modeler and Quest Data Intelligence, Enhancing its Trusted Data Management Platform
items.summary: Quest Software announced Quest Data Modeler, a cloud-native data architecture tool with AI-assisted modeling and real-time collaboration that reduces modeling cycles from weeks to hours, and Quest Data Intelligence, which expands its AI assistant library for governance, lineage, compliance, and natural-language data access. The releases extend Quest's Trusted Data Management Platform to address fragmented data environments while meeting EU AI Act, NIST AI Risk Management Framework, and GDPR requirements.

items.headline: Quest Software Introduces the Quest Trusted Data Management Platform Featuring the Automated Data Product Factory
items.summary: Quest launched its Trusted Data Management Platform, unifying data modeling, cataloging, governance, quality, and a marketplace in a SaaS-native solution built for AI-ready data. The platform's Automated Data Product Factory uses AI to convert natural language requests into production-ready governed data products, delivering data products 54% faster, reducing costs by up to 40%, and improving reuse by up to 50%.

items.headline: Quest Brings AI-Ready Governance and Performance Optimization to Snowflake
items.summary: Quest Software announced at Snowflake Summit 2025 an integration of Foglight for Cloud Cost Optimization and erwin 15 AI-Ready Governance with Snowflake's AI Data Cloud, giving data teams unified visibility into governance and cloud spending. Pilot customers achieved 15-30% cost savings on Snowflake credit consumption through Foglight's warehouse utilization analysis.

items.headline: RecordPoint at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: RecordPoint exhibited at Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1–4, Moscone Center, San Francisco), with CEO Anthony Woodward and other executives on-site to discuss data governance and AI within the Snowflake ecosystem. The company highlighted secure data sharing, AI-powered analytics, and intelligent automation as core focus areas at the event.

items.headline: RecordPoint Named in 2026 Responsible AI Solutions Overview
items.summary: Forrester Research included RecordPoint in its The Responsible AI Solutions Landscape, Q2 2026 report, recognizing the company's data-trust platform as a key solution for regulated organizations governing AI systems. RecordPoint processes over 15 million data transactions daily and serves major clients including the City of New York and Westpac.

items.headline: RecordPoint Acquires Redactive to Boost AI Data Security Focus
items.summary: RecordPoint acquired Australian AI startup Redactive, which specializes in sensitive data discovery and classification, to strengthen its AI governance and data security capabilities for regulated industries. Redactive, backed by Blackbird and Felicis, had secured clients such as superfund HESTA and PEXA before the acquisition.

items.headline: Redpanda at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Redpanda participated as a booth exhibitor at Snowflake Summit 2026 (May 31, San Francisco), showcasing its real-time streaming data platform. The page highlights enterprise customers including Akamai, Cisco, NYSE, and Vodafone.

items.headline: Redpanda Reports Record Q1, Delivering 70% Year-Over-Year Growth
items.summary: Redpanda reported record Q1 fiscal 2027 results with 70% ARR growth year-over-year, closing the most seven-figure deals in a single quarter in company history. The company appointed a new CFO, CMO, and VP of Product, and highlighted its Agentic Data Plane alongside new connectors for Oracle CDC, Amazon DynamoDB, and Salesforce.

items.headline: Redpanda Streaming 26.1 Introduces Industry's First Adaptable Streaming Engine
items.summary: Redpanda launched Streaming 26.1 featuring the R1 engine, billed as the industry's first adaptable streaming engine capable of unifying mission-critical apps, agentic AI workloads, and data lakes on a single platform. Key capabilities include Write Caching for ultra-low latency, Iceberg Topics for zero-ETL streaming to Apache Iceberg tables, and Cloud Topics (now GA) delivering over 90% savings in cross-AZ networking fees.

items.headline: Reducto Raises $75M Series B to Define the Future of AI Document Intelligence
items.summary: Reducto secured $75M in Series B funding led by Andreessen Horowitz, bringing total funding to over $108M. The company's platform processes nearly one billion pages of data for clients including Fortune 10 enterprises and AI startups like Harvey and Scale AI.

items.headline: Reducto acquires Opennote
items.summary: Reducto acquired Opennote, an AI notebook tool for helping users understand and navigate dense, unstructured information. The acquisition strengthens Reducto's document intelligence capabilities by adding expertise in building intuitive experiences on top of complex unstructured data.

items.headline: Reducto Announces $108M in Funding to Define the Future of AI Document Intelligence
items.summary: Reducto's official announcement of its combined $108M funding details plans to expand its Agentic OCR framework with improved chart extraction and document review features, and introduces Reducto Studio for interactive document pipeline workflows. Monthly processing volume has grown 6x since the Series A, with over one billion pages processed.

items.headline: Reflex x Databricks: Python-Powered Vibe Coding for Enterprises
items.summary: Reflex and Databricks announced a partnership integrating Reflex AI Builder with Databricks Apps, enabling Python teams to build and deploy full internal applications directly on Databricks data using prompts or code. Applications stay within Databricks infrastructure with Unity Catalog security controls, removing the need for separate frontend development.

items.headline: Reflex Build: On Prem
items.summary: Reflex launched an enterprise on-premises deployment option for Reflex Build, an AI-powered app builder that runs inside customer infrastructure, enabling teams to build full-stack Python web applications using natural language while maintaining full data sovereignty and compliance with HIPAA, SOC 2, and GDPR requirements.

items.headline: Replit Raises $400M Series D at $9B Valuation, Launches Agent 4
items.summary: Replit closed a $400 million Series D round with Georgian among notable investors, tripling its valuation to $9 billion in six months. The announcement coincided with the launch of Agent 4, which Replit says ships production-ready software 10x faster than its predecessor.

items.headline: Replit Expands Enterprise Leadership with Visa Investment and Partnership, Payments Expansion, and Solution Partner Program
items.summary: Visa invested in Replit and partnered to integrate Visa Intelligent Commerce payment capabilities into the platform, enabling developers to build applications and agents that initiate secure transactions. Over 1,000 Visa employees already use Replit for internal development.

items.headline: Introducing Replit Agent 4: Built for Creativity
items.summary: Replit launched Agent 4, its fastest and most versatile AI coding agent, featuring parallel task execution, an infinite design canvas, and unified build-and-ship capabilities in a single workspace. The agent handles web apps, mobile apps, pitch decks, and more, and uses specialized sub-agents to resolve merge conflicts automatically.

items.headline: AWS Rolls Out Row Zero to Expand Self-Serve Analytics
items.summary: AWS adopted Row Zero as its enterprise cloud spreadsheet platform, enabling teams to work with billion-row datasets in Amazon Redshift and S3 while keeping data within governed cloud environments. Teams reported time savings of 6-7 hours per day on large dataset workflows.

items.headline: Row Zero Raises $10M to Accelerate Development of Its Spreadsheet for Big Data
items.summary: Row Zero closed a $10M seed round led by IA Ventures, with participation from Trilogy Equity Partners, Founder's Co-op, Ludlow Ventures, K9 Ventures, Functional Capital, and Wes McKinney, bringing total funding to $13M. The company plans to use the capital to expand connectors for ERPs and CRMs, integrate AI features, and enhance Python workflow support.

items.headline: New Updates for 2025: Row Zero Launches Remove Duplicates, Version History, Shared Data Sources, and Conditional Formatting
items.summary: Row Zero shipped seven new features at the start of 2025, including remove duplicates, version history, shared data sources, conditional formatting, graph formatting improvements, a redesigned account home, and the SUBTOTAL function. The updates target data teams working with large enterprise datasets connected to warehouses like Snowflake and Databricks.

items.headline: S&P Global and Snowflake bring AI-driven financial analysis to investment research
items.summary: S&P Global's Global Head of New Product Development Liam Hynes presented at Snowflake Summit 2026, demonstrating a framework built on Snowflake's Cortex and CoWork tools that uses large language models to scan the entire S&P 500 for newly disclosed risks in SEC filings in approximately ten minutes. The collaboration highlights how S&P Global is deploying AI-driven financial analysis that compresses days of human research effort into minutes.

items.headline: S&P Global Brings AI-Powered Energy Insights to S&P Capital IQ Pro
items.summary: S&P Global integrated energy market intelligence from S&P Global Energy into S&P Capital IQ Pro, covering 12+ industries across the energy ecosystem and enabling AI-powered analysis via tools including Document Intelligence and ChatIQ. The integration connects energy market dynamics with broader financial analysis within a single workflow platform.

items.headline: S&P Global Acquires Enertel AI Corporation to Enhance Power Market Offering
items.summary: S&P Global completed its acquisition of Enertel AI Corporation, an Ontario-based company specializing in AI and machine learning for short-term power price forecasting in North American electricity markets. Enertel's proprietary Graph Neural Network models deliver probabilistic nodal price forecasts across major ISOs, expanding S&P Global Energy's real-time market intelligence capabilities.

items.headline: Safe Software Exhibiting as Snow Row Sponsor at Snowflake Summit 2026, Booth #1407
items.summary: Safe Software is a Snow Row sponsor at Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1–4), exhibiting at Booth #1407 to showcase FME's data integration capabilities within the Snowflake ecosystem.

items.headline: FME by Safe Software Now Runs Inside Snowflake, Delivering Faster, Safer, In-Database Data Integration
items.summary: Safe Software announced that its FME Remote Engines Service is now available on Snowflake Marketplace, enabling FME's high-performance engine to run directly within Snowpark Container Services and reducing processing times by up to 30%. The integration supports 1,000+ data systems and formats.

items.headline: Safe Software Expands its FME Platform with MCP
items.summary: Safe Software announced Model Context Protocol (MCP) capabilities coming to the FME Platform, including a new MCPCaller transformer and MCP Server capabilities for FME Flow with OAuth 2.0 support. The expansion advances Safe Software's 'All-Data, Any-AI' mission by letting organizations expose FME workflows as governed MCP tools that AI models can securely call.

items.headline: SELECT is joining DoiT to scale our mission of eliminating data platform waste
items.summary: SELECT, the Snowflake cost optimization platform, announced its acquisition by DoiT, a global FinOps and CloudOps company. The deal keeps SELECT as an independent product with its full team intact, while expanding its roadmap beyond Snowflake to Databricks, BigQuery, and Microsoft Fabric.

items.headline: SELECT Announces Automated BigQuery Cost Optimization Early Access Program
items.summary: SELECT by DoiT launched an early access program for an automated BigQuery cost optimization platform, announced at Google Cloud Next 2026 in Las Vegas. The solution includes a Storage Optimizer, Reservations Manager, and Query Router, building on SELECT's automation engine refined across Snowflake deployments, with general availability targeted for Q3 2026.

items.headline: Sema4.ai Raises $25M in Funding for Its AI Agent Platform
items.summary: Sema4.ai closed a $25 million Series A extension with participation from Benchmark, Mayfield Fund, Snowflake Ventures, Rocketship VC, MVP Ventures, and Cox Enterprises. The company simultaneously launched Sema4.ai Team Edition, which integrates its AI agent platform natively with Snowflake via one-click deployment using Snowpark Container Services.

items.headline: Sema4.ai's Agentic AI Comes to the AI Data Cloud with Snowflake Ventures Investment
items.summary: Snowflake Ventures announced its investment in Sema4.ai and the launch of Sema4.ai Team Edition as a Snowflake Native App on Snowflake Marketplace, enabling one-click deployment of AI agents within Snowflake environments. The integration allows customers to orchestrate Cortex AI services including Cortex Search, Cortex Analyst, and Document AI across enterprise data sources.

items.headline: Sema4.ai Announces Semantic Layer Capabilities at the Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026
items.summary: Sema4.ai unveiled its Semantic Layer at the Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026, enabling business users to query databases, documents, and spreadsheets in natural language without SQL expertise, with support for Snowflake, Postgres, and Redshift. Early adopters reported significant efficiency gains, including manufacturers reducing invoice reconciliation from 3 hours to 2 minutes and financial services teams boosting cash matching accuracy from 20% to over 80%.

items.headline: ServiceNow Launches Autonomous Workforce Across Every Major Business Function at Knowledge 2026
items.summary: ServiceNow unveiled a major expansion of its Autonomous Workforce at its Knowledge 2026 conference, introducing AI specialists that autonomously complete end-to-end processes across IT, CRM, HR, finance, security, and risk functions. Early results cited include an internal L1 IT service desk AI specialist resolving cases 99% faster than human agents.

items.headline: ServiceNow Opens Its Full System of Action to Every AI Agent in the Enterprise via Action Fabric
items.summary: ServiceNow announced Action Fabric, a platform that allows any AI agent — built on Claude, Copilot, or custom tools — to execute governed enterprise workflows through an open Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server. Anthropic was named the first design partner, connecting Claude directly to ServiceNow's system of action.

items.headline: ServiceNow and Accenture Launch Forward Deployed Engineering Program to Scale Agentic AI Across the Enterprise
items.summary: ServiceNow and Accenture launched a joint Forward Deployed Engineering program that embeds combined teams inside mutual customer environments to bring agentic AI workflows from pilot to production. The program gives clients access to 300+ pre-built AI agent skills on the ServiceNow AI Platform, governed through ServiceNow's AI Control Tower.

items.headline: Skyflow at Snowflake Summit 2026: Securing PII in Agentic AI Workflows
items.summary: Skyflow exhibited at Snowflake Summit 2026 (June 1-4, San Francisco), where the company discussed how enterprises can secure personally identifiable information in agentic AI workflows.
